summary: First-finish smoke test of GRC Consultant Portal. Backend APIs (auth, options, consultants, chat, mail, admin) tested via public URL — all critical paths working. Frontend tested via Playwright: admin login, language toggle, directory/mail/admin navigation, logout all working. Two issues noted (one minor spec deviation, one possible nav visibility issue).
passed: POST /api/auth/register with valid payload -> 200 with token
GET /api/auth/me with Bearer token -> 200; without token -> 401
GET /api/options returns categories(5), experience(4), areas_of_interest(6), countries(7)
POST /api/chat/send -> 200 with message id; GET /api/chat/messages/{alias} returns conversation; GET /api/chat/conversations returns aggregated list with last_message and unread
POST /api/mail/send, GET /api/mail/inbox, GET /api/mail/sent, POST /api/mail/{id}/read, GET /api/mail/unread/count all working
FRONTEND: /login renders login-title; admin login redirects to /app/admin
FRONTEND: auth-language-toggle flips document.documentElement.dir between ltr and rtl
FRONTEND: Sidebar shows nav-directory-link, nav-profile-link, nav-admin-link for admin
FRONTEND: Directory loads with directory-search-input; Mail page mail-compose-button opens compose with mail-to/subject/body inputs
FRONTEND: logout-button clears auth and returns to /login

failed.issue: Invalid category/experience/area/country returns 422 (Pydantic) instead of spec-required 400. Specifically: register with invalid 'experience' returns 400 ('Invalid experience') correctly via custom check, but Pydantic-level validation (e.g., primary_industry too short, or pre-validation) returns 422.
failed.evidence: curl invalid category payload -> 422 with pydantic detail array. Custom message 'Invalid experience' returns 400 as expected.

failed.issue: nav-chat-link and nav-mail-link reported NOT visible by Playwright is_visible() for admin user at 1365x768 viewport, although code in AppShell.jsx defines them for all users. Could be CSS responsive hiding or a hydration issue. Worth manual verification.
failed.evidence: Playwright sidebar checks: nav-chat-link=False, nav-mail-link=False; nav-directory/profile/admin=True. AppShell.jsx lines 31-39 include all four items regardless of role.

failed.issue: React console warning: '<span> cannot be a child of <option>' in Directory.jsx select elements. Cosmetic, does not break functionality.
failed.evidence: Console error during directory page load referencing Directory.jsx line 69 option element wrapping a span.

action_items: Investigate why nav-chat-link / nav-mail-link are not rendered (or are hidden) in the sidebar for the admin user at desktop viewport. Verify CSS responsive classes (lg:flex etc.) and ensure they show.
Optional: change Pydantic validation to return 400 instead of 422 for invalid category/area/country to match spec wording, OR update spec to accept 422.
Optional: fix Directory.jsx <option> children to not contain <span> (use plain text) to remove React hydration warning.
